title: actinoschoenus chinensis
intro: Actinoschoenus chinensis, also known as the Chinese sand-sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Actinoschoenus chinensis include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Actinoschoenus chinensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
